title: Expense Policy Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger expense policy foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Expense Policy Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Expense Policy Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good expense policy foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Expense Policy Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
